title: Peer Exchange: What Problem Sits Beneath It?
description: Use AI follow-up questions to test whether your current frame names the real problem or only a surface request.

questions.prompt: Share your revised problem statement, what changed from your starting goal, and one place where you are still unsure.
questions.placeholder: Include enough context that the AI can see the difference between your starting goal, the surface request, and the underlying problem you now see.
questions.aiContext: This is Sprint 1 of Reframing Problems with AI. The participant is learning to move from a broad goal or surface request to a specific, testable underlying problem. Push for concrete people, constraints, evidence, and causes. Challenge polished but vague problem statements, solution-first wording, and claims that do not show what changed from the starting goal.
questions.discussionPrompt: Use these questions to sharpen the frame. Then write a refined response that names the real problem, what still needs evidence, and what you would test next.
questions.summaryPlaceholder: Write the problem frame you would carry forward now. Include what changed, what still feels uncertain, and the next evidence you need.
